name: task-management-system
description: Task Management System - Admin, Supervisor, and Member roles

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npx --yes wait-on -t 60000 http://localhost:4000/api/health && npm --prefix client run dev"
